name: restream-srs
description: Minimal RTMP/SRT streaming server with dynamic output management

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,frontend,css -c cyan,yellow,magenta "npx tsx watch src/index.ts" "npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --watch" "npx tailwindcss -i public/input.css -o public/output.css --watch"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: npx tsc -p tsconfig.json && npx tailwindcss -i public/input.css -o public/output.css
scripts.typecheck: npx tsc -p tsconfig.backend.json --noEmit && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
